title: The Islamic Economic System and Its Prospects in Iran
source_org: Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), Directorate of Intelligence
time_coverage: 1979-1987 (Islamic Republic economic policy, first post-revolution decade)
license_terms: US government work, public domain; sanitized/declassified FOIA release
notes: CREST General CIA Records. Publication date January 2, 1987. Sanitized Copy Approved for Release 2011/06/01. Original Classification: Secret. Document Page Count: 30 (adhoc dissemination list on 10 saved pages of this PDF, incl. distribution to White House Situation Room, Council of Economic Advisers, OMB, NSC, USTR). Assesses whether Islamic economic principles (as distinct from pragmatic state control) will persist in Iran's post-revolution economy. FOIA metadata lists title as '(UNTITLED)' but document body clearly states title 'THE ISLAMIC ECONOMIC SYSTEM AND ITS PROSPECTS IN IRAN'.
